may2015-ch4-c2h6-012.failure_reason: Ipopt solution failed local physical acceptance

limitations: The calculation fixes two phases and provides no phase-discovery, TPD, continuation, or global-stability certificate.
Rows with local solver acceptance but composition disagreement are model/data misses under the frozen 3*u_c contract, not solver defects.
A package local-physical rejection is retained as such and receives no composition comparison.
This validation transfers no runtime, release, publication, or promotion authority.

row_outcomes.failure_reason: Ipopt solution failed local physical acceptance

citation.title: Reference Quality Vapor-Liquid Equilibrium Data for the Binary Systems Methane + Ethane, + Propane, + Butane, and + 2-Methylpropane, at Temperatures from (203 to 273) K and Pressures to 9 MPa

tolerance_basis.interpretation: A conservative engineering comparison allowance of three combined standard uncertainties; not a claimed confidence interval because the source does not report a distribution or effective degrees of freedom for uc.
tolerance_basis.temperature_pressure_treatment: Temperature and pressure are fixed campaign inputs. Their standard uncertainties are retained but are not added again because uc(x1) and uc(y2) already include their propagated contributions in quadrature.
